topic: Richard Myer birthday, b
agenda: Richard Myer (father) birthday, b. 1963.

topic: Deb birthday, b
agenda: Deb (Deborah Greenfield-Myer, mother) birthday, b. 1967.

topic: Jake Callahan birthday, b
agenda: Jake Callahan (business partner) birthday, b. 1992.

topic: Lauren Pratt birthday, b
agenda: Lauren Pratt (girlfriend) birthday, b. 1996.

topic: Brewery lease renewal paperwork due to landlord
agenda: Brewery lease renewal paperwork due to landlord. Jake handles submission while Stuart runs Thursday brew day.

topic: Oktoberfest release at Driftwood
agenda: Oktoberfest release at Driftwood. Stuart's American amber lager; Megan leads taproom floor while Stuart handles production and tasting notes.

topic: Coalition board meeting and CAFO permit testimony prep, 7 PM at Evergreen Clu...
agenda: Coalition board meeting and CAFO permit testimony prep, 7 PM at Evergreen Club downtown.

topic: Pacific Craft Beer Festival at Waterfront Park
agenda: Pacific Craft Beer Festival at Waterfront Park. Driftwood pouring; Megan and part-time bartenders cover the taproom.

topic: Coalition annual report due
agenda: Coalition annual report due. Stuart writing the water quality testing section after morning Bubbe/Deb visit.

topic: Jake's wedding to Rachel Foster at Riverdale Botanical Gardens, 4 PM
agenda: Jake's wedding to Rachel Foster at Riverdale Botanical Gardens, 4 PM. Stuart is best man. Taproom covered by Megan and part-time staff. Best man speech draft in progress.

topic: Thanksgiving at Deb's
agenda: Thanksgiving at Deb's. Jewish-American fusion dinner. Brewery closed; Thursday brew day canceled.

topic: Brewery holiday party and winter ale release
agenda: Brewery holiday party and winter ale release. Taproom event; Megan coordinating service flow.

topic: Christmas at Richard and Deb's house
agenda: Christmas at Richard and Deb's house. Taproom closed.
